description_long: This helmet is constructed from a dark, metallic material and features a robust, rounded dome that covers the entire head. The front is protected by a prominent cage-like face guard composed of several thick, curved metal bars, providing both visibility and facial protection. The helmet extends downward at the back and sides, offering additional coverage to the neck and lower head. A pronounced central ridge runs from the front to the back along the top, adding structural strength and a distinctive visual line. The surface is matte with subtle textural irregularities, suggesting hand-forged or cast metalwork. There are no visible logos, graphics, or ventilation openings, giving the helmet a utilitarian and historical appearance.
description: A dark, full-coverage metal helmet with a cage-like face guard and a pronounced central ridge, featuring a matte, slightly textured finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded dome, extended neck guard, and the prominent cage-like face guard at the front.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the central ridge running along the top and the extended coverage at the back of the helmet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the helmet's smooth curvature and the side profile of the face guard.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the cage-like face guard structure and the full facial coverage provided by the metal bars.
